ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form submission */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the e-Form */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the form was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the form (e.g., submitted, under review) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the form */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the form is submitted */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of the form (e.g., contract, change request) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version of the form at the time of submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form this field belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the field */,
  "xpath" TEXT /* XPath to locate the field in the form document */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field is required (true/false) */,
  "notice_count" INTEGER /* Count of notices issued related to this field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., text, number, date) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_fields_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notices" (
  "notice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notice */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field associated with this notice */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the notice was issued */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notice (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the notice was resolved */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for resolving the notice */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notices_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES form_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notices_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., submitter, reviewer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for easier communication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the form */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this version became effective */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_versions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Outcome of the check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the compliance check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the form associated with this change */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field associated with this change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES form_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field being mapped */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External identifier mapped to this field */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source system or regulation this mapping relates to */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_mappings_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES form_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the notice associated with this notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., pending, sent, failed) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_notice_id FOREIGN KEY ("notice_id") REFERENCES notices ("notice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the regulatory update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was issued */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "affected_forms" TEXT /* List of forms affected by the update */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the update becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
